name: Saltcorn
description: Saltcorn — Open-source no-code database application builder for creating business apps without writing code.

seo.title: Saltcorn — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Saltcorn: Saltcorn — Open-source no-code database application builder for creating business apps without writing code.

when_to_use: Open-source no-code database app for a business process
Self-hosted Airtable alternative with custom app builder
Internal data management app without writing backend code
Community-maintained no-code tool for SMB data workflows
Custom forms and data views built on self-hosted Saltcorn

pros: Plugin architecture covers most business cases
Runs on cheap VPS — no SaaS bills
Active community for a niche project
cons: UI polish lags behind commercial no-code
Smaller ecosystem than Budibase or NocoDB
Deploy and update flow still manual
review.verdict: Honest open-source Airtable alternative for self-hosters who value ownership over visual polish.
review.best_for: Technical teams who want a free self-hosted internal-tools platform
review.not_for: Non-technical users expecting SaaS polish out of the box
